scripts.build:web: cd webapp && bun run build && mkdir -p ../dist && rm -rf ../dist/web && cp -r dist ../dist/web
scripts.build:
bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --packages external && printf '#!/usr/bin/env node
' | cat - dist/index.js > dist/_tmp && mv dist/_tmp dist/index.js && bun run build:web
scripts.release: npm run clean && npm run build && npm version patch && npm publish
scripts.test:web: bun test src/agent/__tests__/skill-manager.test.ts src/commands/__tests__/web.test.ts src/commands/__tests__/web-api.test.ts src/services/__tests__/cron.test.ts
